description: Get the details of a specific Contract's Invoice Configuration

separate_billing_for_stored_materials.description: Whether billing for materials separately from the work complete is allowed

move_materials_to_previous_work_complete.description: True if the Project Invoice Configuration is set to move materials to previous work completed

commitment_has_invoices.description: True if there are any invoices associated with this commitment

retainage_rule_set.description: A set of rules to control how retainage is applied to invoices of a contract

contract_id.description: Integer ID for the associated Contract

name.description: The Name of the Retainage Rule Set
